subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-03-19
subcodes.first_line: We must try to return very soon to Haifa. There upon the mountain all alone, pray and supplicate with God. There one finds the ecstasy of spiritual bliss. Supplication, invocation, prayer, inspiration.
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @Shrines and Holy places, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation
